stemHtml:
Refer to figure.

Given the significant weather chart above, and without altering their level, how may the pilots steer clear of turbulence during a direct flight (i.e. a straight line) from Paris to New York at FL380?

options.a: Immediately deviate by turning South by at least 5º to avoid the region near 50ºN 010ºW.
options.b: Immediately deviate by turning South by at least 5º to avoid the region near 50ºN 010ºW, then regain the track and turn South again before the region at 45ºN 060ºW.
options.c: Follow the planned route and deviate South before the turbulence in the region of 45ºN 060ºW.
options.d: Fly direct and do not make any deviations.
